ddls:
CREATE TABLE "armadas" (
  "armada_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each armada */,
  "armada_name" TEXT /* Name of the armada */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the armada */,
  "commander_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commander in charge of the armada */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the armada was established */,
  "current_mission" TEXT /* Current mission or operation the armada is involved in */,
  "base_location" TEXT /* Base location of the armada */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the armada (e.g., active, on leave, in port) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("armada_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ships" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ship */,
  "armada_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the armada the ship belongs to */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "tonnage" INTEGER /* Tonnage of the ship */,
  "num_soldiers" INTEGER /* Number of soldiers on the ship */,
  "num_sailors" INTEGER /* Number of sailors on the ship */,
  "total_men" INTEGER /* Total number of men on the ship */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date when the ship was commissioned */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date when the ship was decommissioned (if applicable) */,
  "current_location" TEXT /* Current location of the ship */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ship (e.g., active, in maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ships_armada_id FOREIGN KEY ("armada_id") REFERENCES armadas ("armada_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artillery" (
  "artillery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artillery record */,
  "armada_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the armada the artillery belongs to */,
  "num_artillery" INTEGER /* Number of artillery pieces */,
  "num_balls" INTEGER /* Number of balls */,
  "gunpowder_kg" INTEGER /* Amount of gunpowder in kilograms */,
  "lead_kg" INTEGER /* Amount of lead in kilograms */,
  "rope_meters" INTEGER /* Length of rope in meters */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who last inspected the artillery */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the artillery (e.g., operational, under repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artillery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artillery_armada_id FOREIGN KEY ("armada_id") REFERENCES armadas ("armada_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artillery_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fleet commander, supply officer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "armada_id" INTEGER /* ID of the armada being accessed */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "is_success" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_armada_id FOREIGN KEY ("armada_id") REFERENCES armadas ("armada_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ship_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance in currency units */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ship_maintenance_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ship_maintenance_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ship_maintenance_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)
